de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class SingleLineComment

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Comment
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.SingleLineComment
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SourceElement, SVSubstitute

    public class SingleLineComment
extends Comment
    Any non-SingleLineComment is a multi line comment.
